---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to the agent infrastructure, skills, or pipeline
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

What is missing, hard to do, or could be better? Describe the pain point.

## Proposed Solution

What should change? Be specific about which part of the agent infrastructure
this affects.

## Affected Area

- [ ] New or improved skill (`.opencode/skills/`)
- [ ] Agent prompt refinement (`.opencode/agents/`)
- [ ] Pipeline / workflow change (`AGENTS.md`)
- [ ] New MCP server or MCP config improvement (`opencode.json`)
- [ ] Tooling / permission rule
- [ ] Testing / Playwright infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation (`CONTRIBUTING.md`, `README.md`, etc.)
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Alternatives Considered

What else have you considered? Why isn't that sufficient?

## Example

If applicable, sketch the desired behavior:
- Before: (current behavior)
- After: (desired behavior)

## Additional Context

Any references, prior art, or related issues.
